notes: Full dinner menu + cocktails captured. Allergen notes (*contains nuts/sesame/shellfish*, tableside prep) folded into descriptions, not dietary_tags. Only firm dietary marks recorded: Vegetarian Feature -> VEG; Three Cheese Cheesecake 'gf graham crust' -> GF. Congee soup two-price (cup/bowl). Waterfront room with Elliott Bay sunset views. Wine-by-the-glass not listed on the page.

dishes.name: Grand Central Bakery Bread & Butter
dishes.description: Potato sourdough, goldendale whole wheat, ube butter.
